name: Marble Lake
description: Marble Lake is a place to play pickleball in Quincy, MI. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Parkhurst Park
description: Come play pickleball at Parkhurst Park in Coldwater, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Riverview Park
description: Come play pickleball at Riverview Park in Union City, MI! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Park is open dawn to dusk.

name: Robert Browne Activity Center
description: Robert Browne Activity Center is a place to play pickleball in Coldwater, MI. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Township Hall Courts
description: Township Hall Courts is a place to play pickleball in Coldwater, MI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
